output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?building ?height ?label WHERE {
  ?building wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q41176 .
  ?building wdt:P2048 ?height .
  ?building wdt:P1619 ?completion .
  BIND(SUBSTR(STR(?completion) , 1 , 4) AS ?yearStr)
  FILTER(?yearStr <= "2018")
  FILTER(isNumeric(?height) && ?height > 500)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?building rdfs:label ?label .
    FILTER(lang(?label) = 'en')
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?height)
LIMIT 1
